tasks.label: Florence: Build Florence Base Image
tasks.command: export $(grep -v '^#' .env | xargs) && echo "Building for: ${ACCELERATOR:-cpu}" && docker build -f Dockerfile.base -t florence-base:latest --build-arg DEVICE=${ACCELERATOR:-cpu} .
tasks.detail: Automatically reads ACCELERATOR from .env and builds the correct base image.

tasks.label: Florence: Total Reset (Compose Down + Cleanup)
tasks.command: docker compose down --remove-orphans && docker container prune -f && docker image prune -f
tasks.detail: Stops infra, removes orphaned containers and dangling images. Leaves network intact.

tasks.label: Florence: Auto-Detect Hardware Config
tasks.command: RGID=$(getent group render | cut -d: -f3 || echo 992); VGID=$(getent group video | cut -d: -f3 || echo 44); GFX="11.0.0"; for KEY in RENDER_GID VIDEO_GID HSA_OVERRIDE_GFX_VERSION ROCM_ALLOW_UNSAFE_ASIC TORCH_ROCM_AOTRITON_ENABLE_EXPERIMENTAL; do if [ "$KEY" = "RENDER_GID" ]; then VAL=$RGID; elif [ "$KEY" = "VIDEO_GID" ]; then VAL=$VGID; elif [ "$KEY" = "HSA_OVERRIDE_GFX_VERSION" ]; then VAL=$GFX; else VAL="1"; fi; if grep -q "^$KEY=" .env; then sed -i "s/^$KEY=.*/$KEY=$VAL/" .env; else [ -s .env ] && [ -n "$(tail -c1 .env)" ] && echo "" >> .env; echo "$KEY=$VAL" >> .env; fi; done; echo "SUCCESS: RENDER=$RGID, VIDEO=$VGID, GFX=$GFX, UNSAFE_ASIC=1, AOTRITON=1"
tasks.detail: Detects GIDs and sets ROCm/AOTriton flags for Radeon 860M in .env.
